cross_scene_arcs.title: Defying Family for Stephanie
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ray consistently prioritizes his relationship with Stephanie over his mother's disapproval, from defending their bond to physically defying his mother to support Stephanie.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Asserting commitment to Stephanie despite familial disapproval.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Defying his mother to follow Stephanie after her outburst at dinner.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ongoing tension with his mother, Trudy, regarding Stephanie.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting the Supernatural Curse
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ray progresses from skepticism about supernatural claims to gradual involvement, culminating in belief after witnessing Stephanie's death caused by the cursed button.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Skeptical of psychic warnings and curses.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Believes in the curse after Stephanie's death and holds the cursed button.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The cursed button remains with Ray, and the threat from Lamia is unaddressed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Supporting Stephanie Through Trauma
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ray takes on a caretaker role for Stephanie, moving from concern after her attack to actively supporting her beliefs by paying the psychic, despite his personal disbelief.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Concerned partner after Stephanie describes a supernatural attack.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Supportive partner who acts to help Stephanie by acknowledging her beliefs.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Stephanie's PTSD and the underlying supernatural threat remain unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Promotion Pursuit and Setback
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Stephanie enforces bank policy to secure a promotion but later loses the position to a colleague.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Promotion denied and given to Stu
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Professional disappointment and strained relationship with Mr. Jacks

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation with Mrs. Ganush and Curse
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After denying Mrs. Ganush's request, Stephanie is attacked and cursed, then learns from Rham Jas that a bad spirit is upon her.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cursed and aware of supernatural threat
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The nature and source of the curse

cross_scene_arcs.title: Torment and Attempts to Break the Curse
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Stephanie endures supernatural attacks, seeks help through a séance, and attempts to transfer the curse via a grave ritual.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Terrified and injured from supernatural assault
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Completed grave ritual but shaken and uncertain of success
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the curse has been successfully returned

cross_scene_arcs.title: Ray's Support and Tragic End
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ray supports Stephanie through her ordeal, paying for supernatural help, but their reunion leads to her death due to the curse.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bank Denial to Curse
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ganush's mortgage plea is rejected, leading to humiliation and her cursing Stephanie in revenge.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Seeking loan extension to save home
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Curses Stephanie and disappears after confrontation

cross_scene_arcs.title: Supernatural Haunting Escalation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ganush attacks Stephanie physically and in dreams, refusing to lift the curse and insisting on her suffering.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Posthumous Manifestation and Desecration
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After death, Ganush's corpse and spectral form continue to influence events, ending with Stephanie desecrating her grave.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Deceased with supernatural activity at wake
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Impact of grave ritual on curse
